hero.title: Premium agricultural commodities and livestock from the heart of the Nile basin.
hero.subtitle: Nile Reach Global connects Sudanese producers with international markets — delivering livestock, grains, oilseeds, and processed goods to buyers across the Gulf, Asia, Europe, and beyond.

productsSection.title: From the Sudanese fields to global tables
productsSection.subtitle: Three core categories, each built on long-standing relationships with verified producers and processors across Sudan.
productsSection.livestockDesc: Live sheep, cattle, and goats — sourced from traditional rearing regions and prepared for export under strict veterinary and halal standards.
productsSection.cropsDesc: Sesame, peanuts, wheat, sorghum (dura), sunflower, and berseem — the staples of Sudanese agriculture, cleaned and graded for international buyers.
productsSection.processedDesc: Halal-processed meat, cleaned oilseeds, and value-added agricultural products ready for distribution.

productGallery.title: A taste of what we trade
productGallery.subtitle: From farms across Sudan — sourced, graded, and shipped worldwide.

descriptions.sheep: Live Sudanese sheep from traditional rearing regions, prepared for export under strict veterinary and halal standards.
descriptions.cattle: Robust Sudanese cattle breeds suited to long-distance transport, raised in extensive pastoral systems.
descriptions.goats: Hardy goat breeds from arid Sudanese regions, well-suited for the GCC and African meat markets.
descriptions.sesame: Premium Sudanese sesame seeds (white and mixed grades), cleaned and graded for international buyers.
descriptions.peanut: Sudanese groundnuts known for high oil content and clean flavor, available in-shell or shelled.
descriptions.wheat: Sudanese wheat for milling and feed applications, cleaned to international export standards.
descriptions.sorghum: Sorghum (locally known as Dura) — a Sudanese staple used for food, brewing, and animal feed.
descriptions.sunflower: Sunflower seeds with strong oil yields, sourced from Sudan's central farming regions.
descriptions.berseem: Berseem clover — a high-protein forage crop used as livestock feed across the Middle East.

productGallery.halalMeat: Halal-slaughtered meat from inspected facilities, packed and labeled for export to GCC and beyond.
productGallery.oilseeds: Cleaned oilseeds ready for crushing — sesame, peanut, and sunflower.
productGallery.valueAdded: Value-added agricultural products and packaged goods ready for distribution.

about.title: Built on the rivers that built a civilization.
about.body: The confluence of the Blue Nile and White Nile at Khartoum — known as Mogran — has been a meeting point for trade and culture for millennia. Nile Reach Global carries that heritage forward, working with farmers, herders, and processors across Sudan to bring their products to a global market with reliability, transparency, and care.

page.title: Where Sudan's harvests meet the world's markets.
page.subtitle: Headquartered in Ajman, UAE — sourcing across Sudan — shipping worldwide.
page.storyTitle: From the Mogran to the world
page.storyBody1: The Mogran is the meeting point of the Blue Nile and White Nile in Khartoum — a place that has served as a hub for trade, agriculture, and culture for thousands of years. Civilizations were built here. Crops travelled from here. The name of our company comes from that geography.
page.storyBody2: Nile Reach Global Group was founded with a simple mission: bring the best of Sudan's agricultural heritage to international buyers, with the reliability, transparency, and care that modern trade demands.
page.processSubtitle: Five steps, from source to destination.
page.step1Body: Direct relationships with Sudanese farmers, herders, and cooperatives — no opaque middlemen.
page.step2Body: Veterinary and quality inspection at origin, with documentation that follows every shipment.
page.step3Body: Licensed halal facilities and ISO-aligned processing, prepared to the destination market's standards.
page.step4Body: Export-ready packaging, full logistics support, and the paperwork to clear customs cleanly.
page.step5Body: Ongoing communication from contract signing through delivery — and beyond, for repeat shipments.
page.value1Body: We work with traditions thousands of years old and the people who keep them alive.
page.value2Body: Verified partners. Transparent supply chains. Documentation at every step.
page.value3Body: Ajman HQ, Sudan sourcing, worldwide shipping — built for international trade.

quality.title: Halal-certified. Veterinary-inspected. Export-ready.
quality.body: Every shipment passes through licensed processing facilities and is inspected against the standards required by the destination market.

page.title: Every shipment, inspected. Every step, documented.
page.subtitle: From farm to port, we maintain strict standards aligned with international halal, veterinary, and quality requirements.
page.halalBody: All meat and livestock follow Islamic halal slaughter and handling practices, certified by recognised authorities.
page.vetBody: Every animal undergoes veterinary inspection before slaughter. Health certificates accompany every shipment.
page.isoBody: Our processing partners follow ISO-aligned quality management standards for food safety and traceability.
page.processSubtitle: From farm to your destination, every step is documented.
page.facilityBody: Photographs from working processing facilities. Shared for trade buyers and importers evaluating our supply chain.
page.tradeOnlyNotice: The images below show real processing operations and may not be suitable for all audiences. Shared for transparency with serious trade buyers.
